plugin.name: Hash Checker
plugin.description: Calculate MD5 and SHA-256 for a file, then cross-check a pasted hash against that selected file.
title: Hash Checker
description: Calculate MD5 and SHA-256 for a file, then verify a pasted hash against the same selected file.
hash.label: Hash
hash.placeholder: Paste an MD5 or SHA-256 value to verify...
summary.initial: Choose a file to calculate its hashes.
output.placeholder: MD5, SHA-256, and verification details will appear here.
verify.none: Paste an MD5 or SHA-256 value and click Verify Hash to cross-check it against this file.
verify.invalid: The provided hash is not a valid MD5 or SHA-256 value.
verify.match.md5: Match confirmed. The selected file matches the pasted MD5 hash.
verify.match.sha256: Match confirmed. The selected file matches the pasted SHA-256 hash.
verify.mismatch: No match. The pasted hash does not match the selected file.
dialog.missing.title: Missing Input
dialog.missing.hash: Paste an MD5 or SHA-256 value to verify.
error.not_file: Choose a valid file to analyze.
